sqlMap.select: select * from vm_sealRecordInfo where sealName=#sealName# and sealStatus =#sealStatus#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_sealApplyArchiveChildInfo ( id, formmainId, sealCount, approver, keeper, keeperDept, sealStatus, sort, sealSerialNumber, sealName, sealNumber )values( #id#, #formmainId#, #sealCount#, #approver#, #keeper#, #keeperDept#, #sealStatus#, (select max(sort)+1 from vm_sealApplyArchiveChildInfo), (select max(sealSerialNumber)+1 from vm_sealApplyArchiveChildInfo), #sealName#, #sealNumber# )

insert into vm_sealApplyArchiveInfo (id, state, startMemberId, startDate, approveMemberId, approveDate, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratifyMemberId, ratifyDate, modifyMemberId, modifyDate, sort, businessTitle, applyUserNo, agentUserNo, sealDate, applyDeptCode, sealNumberTotal, remark, applyNo, businessType, files, sealedFiles, serialNumber, businessSubType, businessURL )values ( #id#, #state#, #startMemberId#, #startDate#, #approveMemberId#, #approveDate#, #finishedflag#, #ratifyflag#, #ratifyMemberId#, #ratifyDate#, #modifyMemberId#, #modifyDate#, (select max(sort)+1 from vm_sealApplyArchiveInfo), #businessTitle#, #applyUserCode#, #agentUserNo#, #sealDate#, #applyDeptCode#, #sealNumberTotal#, #remark#, #applyNo#, #businessType#, #fileStringBuffer#, #sealedFilesStringBuffer#, #serialNumber#, #businessSubType#, #businessURL#
)
sqlMap.select: select id, sealId, sealCode, sealName, sealnameenum from (select id, sealId, sealCode, sealName, sealnameenum from VM_SEALRECORDINFO union all select id, sealId, sealCode, sealName, sealnameenum from VM_SEALRECORDINFOSH) where sealid = #sealid#
select id,sealId,sealCode,sealName,sealnameenum from VM_SEALRECORDINFO where sealisok=#sealisok#
sqlMap.insert: insert into VM_SEALRECORDINFO ( id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, modify_member_id, modify_date, sort, sealstatus, opendate, sealname, sealid, sealcode, sealisok, sealnameenum, restrainnumber ) values ( #formId#, 1, '6105960157477424523', sysdate, '0', sysdate, 0, 0, '0', sysdate, '6105960157477424523', sysdate, 0, #sealstatus#, sysdate, #sealname#, #sealid#, #sealcode#, #sealisok#, #sealnameenum#, #restrainNumber# )
sqlMap.update: update VM_SEALRECORDINFO set sealstatus = #sealstatus# where id = #id#
update VM_SEALRECORDINFO set sealname = #sealname#, sealnameenum = #sealnameenum# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select: select to_char(ID) id, to_char(REF_ENUMID) as parentId, SHOWVALUE, to_char(ENUMVALUE) ENUMVALUE, to_char(SORTNUMBER) SORTNUMBER, STATE, OUTPUT_SWITCH, ORG_ACCOUNT_ID, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, LEVEL_NUM, DESCRIPTION, IFUSE, I18N, EXT1 from ctp_enum_item where id = #id#
select '1938448756302630027' parentid, to_char(max(f.sortnumber+1)) as enumvalue, to_char(max(f.sortnumber+1)) as sortnumber from ctp_enum_item f where f.ref_enumid = 1938448756302630027
select id,sealId,sealCode,sealName,sealnameenum from VM_SEALRECORDINFOSH where sealid = #sealid#
select id,sealId,sealCode,sealName,sealnameenum from VM_SEALRECORDINFOSH where sealisok=#sealisok#
sqlMap.update: update VM_SEALRECORDINFOSH set sealstatus = #sealstatus# where id = #id#
update VM_SEALRECORDINFOSH set sealname = #sealname#, sealnameenum = #sealnameenum# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select: select '-2170604792472449072' parentid, to_char(max(f.sortnumber+1)) as enumvalue, to_char(max(f.sortnumber+1)) as sortnumber from ctp_enum_item f where f.ref_enumid = -2170604792472449072
sqlMap.insert: insert into VM_SEALRECORDINFOSH ( id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, modify_member_id, modify_date, sort, sealstatus, opendate, sealname, sealid, sealcode, sealisok, sealnameenum, signtype, restrainNumber ) values ( #formId#, 1, '6105960157477424523', sysdate, '0', sysdate, 0, 0, '0', sysdate, '6105960157477424523', sysdate, 0, #sealstatus#, sysdate, #sealname#, #sealid#, #sealcode#, #sealisok#, #sealnameenum#, '3924100868922361882', #restrainNumber# )
sqlMap.select:
select A1.TYPE, A1.ID, A1.SERIALNO, A1.SUBJECTMATTER, A1.SENDUSER, A1.FILEKEYS, A1.PRESERVER, A1.SIGNTYPE, A1.SEALID, A1.EDGESIGN, A1.KEYWORDSIGN from vm_sealcolinfo a1 where 1=1
type = #type#
id = #id#

select id, state, start_member_id start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, sort, modify_member_id, modify_date, flowName, serialNumber, isPigeonhole, EQBSerialNumber, retryCount, sealState, sealFormName, signareataskid from vm_electronicsealrecord where sealState = 1219999897547194393 and isSignSeal = -3841538853571705149
select sysCode, routingKey, bussType, isEnable from vm_sealQueueConfig where isEnable = -3841538853571705149
